code:
import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws_at(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Bool
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b == 32 or b == 10 or b == 9 or b == 13
  when None
    false
  end
end

fn at(_ xs: List<Int>, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match xs.get(i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    panic("oob")
  end
end

let s = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(s)
mut starts: List<Int> = []
mut ends: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
while i < n
  while i < n and is_ws_at(s, i)
    i = i + 1
  end
  if i < n
    let start = i
    while i < n and not is_ws_at(s, i)
      i = i + 1
    end
    starts = list.push(starts, start)
    ends = list.push(ends, i)
  end
end

let total = list.len(starts)
mut unique = 0
mut k = 0
while k < total
  let sk = at(starts, k)
  let ek = at(ends, k)
  let tok = string.substring(s, sk, ek)
  mut found = false
  mut j = 0
  while j < k
    let sj = at(starts, j)
    let ej = at(ends, j)
    let prev = string.substring(s, sj, ej)
    if tok == prev
      found = true
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  if not found
    unique = unique + 1
  end
  k = k + 1
end

println("unique=#{unique}")
